dashboard.step1: Configure your media server connection in Settings → System
dashboard.step2: Select which libraries to sync in Settings → Libraries
dashboard.step3: Run the "Sync Movies" job in Jobs to import your movie library
dashboard.step4: Enable users who should receive AI recommendations in Users
dashboard.step5: Run the "Generate Embeddings" job to create movie embeddings
dashboard.step6: Run the "Generate Recommendations" job to create personalized picks

gaps.pageSubtitle: Compare TMDB movie collections against your synced library to find missing titles. Requests via Seerr are never automatic — you choose what to request.
gaps.statusTmdbBad: Add your TMDb API key in Admin → Settings
gaps.statusCollectionsBad: Run Enrich Metadata (Admin → Jobs) so movies get collection_id from TMDb
gaps.statusSeerrBad: Configure Seerr in Admin → Settings to request missing titles
gaps.inProgressScan: In progress — {{scanned}} collections scanned, {{missing}} missing released titles so far, ~{{pct}}% released parts in library.
gaps.lastRun: Last run: {{when}} — {{scanned}} collections, {{missing}} missing released titles, ~{{pct}}% released parts in library. Re-run after syncing new movies.
gaps.noRunYet: No run yet. Start an analysis to scan your library against TMDb collections.
gaps.scanningCollections: Scanning collections — results appear below as each batch finishes.
gaps.missingSoFar: {{count}} missing released title so far — the grid updates as analysis runs.
gaps.missingSoFar_plural: {{count}} missing released titles so far — the grid updates as analysis runs.
gaps.noMissingInSnapshot: No missing titles in this snapshot (or nothing matches the filter).
gaps.dialogBulkBody: This will send {{count}} request(s) to Seerr using your linked account (Radarr options already chosen). You can track them under My Requests.

usersPage.errorLoadUsers: Failed to load users from media server
usersPage.aiOverrideOn: {{name}} can now control their AI explanation preference
usersPage.aiOverrideOff: {{name}} will use the global AI explanation setting
usersPage.discoverOff: {{name}} will no longer see discovery suggestions
usersPage.discoverReqOff: {{name}} can no longer request discovered content
usersPage.subtitleDesktop: Manage {{provider}} users and enable AI recommendations
usersPage.syncTooltip: Import new users and sync profile data (email, admin status) from media server
usersPage.syncTooltipShort: Sync new users from media server
usersPage.discoverColTooltip: Show discovery suggestions for content not in library
usersPage.requestColTooltip: Allow user to request discovered content via Seerr
usersPage.aiOverrideColTooltip: Allow user to control their AI explanation preference

userDetail.recsEmpty: No recommendations generated yet. Run the recommendations job to generate picks for this user.
userDetail.diagnosticsPlaceholder: Recommendation diagnostics and score breakdowns will appear here.
userDetail.seerrIdInvalid: Seerr user id must be a positive integer or empty to clear
userDetail.watchHistoryBody: Allow this user to mark movies and series as unwatched. This will update both the media server (Emby/Jellyfin) and Aperture's database.
userDetail.watchHistoryToggleHint: User can mark items as unwatched from their Watch History page and movie detail pages
userDetail.discoveryBody: Control this user's access to the Discovery feature, which suggests content not currently in your library based on their taste profile.
userDetail.discoverySuggestionsHint: User can view AI-powered suggestions for movies and series not in the library
userDetail.discoveryRequestHint: User can request discovered content to be added to the library via Seerr
userDetail.discoveryRequiresDiscover: Request permission requires Discovery to be enabled first.
userDetail.seerrMappingBody: Optional override: numeric user id from Seerr (Users in Seerr). When set, content requests are attributed to this Seerr account. Leave empty to rely on automatic matching by email or username.
userDetail.aiExplanationBody: Control whether this user can customize their AI explanation preferences.
userDetail.globalSettingEnabledAllowed: Global Setting: AI explanations are enabled by default (per-user overrides allowed)
userDetail.globalSettingEnabledDisallowed: Global Setting: AI explanations are enabled by default (per-user overrides disabled globally)
userDetail.globalSettingDisabledAllowed: Global Setting: AI explanations are disabled by default (per-user overrides allowed)
userDetail.globalSettingDisabledDisallowed: Global Setting: AI explanations are disabled by default (per-user overrides disabled globally)
userDetail.allowOverrideHint: When enabled, this user can toggle AI explanations on/off for their own recommendations
userDetail.overridesDisabledGlobally: Per-user overrides are disabled globally. Enable "Allow Per-User Overrides" in Settings → AI Config → Algorithm to grant users override permission.
userDetail.userChoseEnable: (User has chosen to enable AI explanations)
userDetail.userChoseDisable: (User has chosen to disable AI explanations)
userDetail.watchHistoryTabEmpty: No watch history found. Run the watch history sync job to import data from the media server.

jobsPage.title: Background Jobs
jobsPage.subtitle: Manage syncing, AI processing, and system maintenance tasks
jobsPage.scheduleSubtitle: Configure when each job runs automatically. Disabled jobs will only run when manually triggered.
jobsPage.enrichmentBody1: A previous enrichment run was interrupted (possibly due to a container restart).
jobsPage.enrichmentRemaining: {{movies}} movies and {{series}} series still need enrichment.
jobsPage.enrichmentCompletedBefore: ({{movies}} movies and {{series}} series were completed before interruption.)
jobsPage.enrichmentFooter: Click Resume to continue enrichment, or Dismiss to clear this warning.

movieSync.title: Sync
movieSync.description: Sync movies and watch history from your media server

movieLib.description: Build AI recommendation libraries in your media server

seriesSync.title: Sync
seriesSync.description: Sync series and watch history from your media server

seriesAi.description: Machine learning tasks for TV series

seriesLib.title: Aperture Libraries
seriesLib.description: Build AI recommendation libraries in your media server

globalMeta.title: Metadata Enrichment
globalMeta.description: Enrich with TMDb, OMDb, MDBList data and studio logos

globalCurated.title: Curated Libraries
globalCurated.description: Top Picks popularity lists and Shows You Watch favorites sync

globalIntegrations.title: Integrations
globalIntegrations.description: Sync with Trakt and update AI pricing data

ui.cancelBody: Are you sure you want to stop {{name}}? The job will be cancelled and any progress will be lost.
ui.historyEmpty: No run history found for this job.
ui.configManualOnlyBody: This job deletes all existing data before rebuilding. It cannot be scheduled and must be run manually. Use only after major algorithm changes, embedding model changes, or if recommendations appear corrupted.
ui.configPreviewManualOnly: Manual only - this job cannot be scheduled

home.heroSubtitle: Here's what we've picked for you based on your watch history
home.topPicksSubtitle: AI-powered recommendations based on your taste
home.topPicksEmpty: No recommendations yet. Your personalized picks will appear here once they're generated.
home.recentEmpty: No watch history yet. Movies you watch will appear here.
home.discoverMoreSubtitle: Browse the full movie library to find something new
